name: forge_build
description: Run the full Forge audit pipeline against the current site. Reads cms/*.json, applies every configured phase (tokens, html_semantic, contrast, csp, label_consistency, link_check, phantom_button, substrate_purity, etc.), and writes static/ output plus reports/build-<id>.json. In production mode strict findings must equal zero or the build fails per AVP-Doctrine rule build-001. Returns the build report path and a summary of findings by severity. Use this to validate a CMS edit + render output simultaneously.

mode.description: Build mode. 'production' enforces strict findings == 0. 'poc' is permissive (default for iteration). 'hybrid' = SPA-augmented static. 'dynamic' = full runtime.

json_report.description: Optional path to emit a machine-readable findings report alongside the terminal output.

root.description: Override the Forge root (where forge.toml lives). Defaults to current working directory.
